page: Amazon Web Services m7gd.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by custom AWS Graviton processors. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on the ARM64 architecture using the Neoverse-V1 model, running at 2.6 GHz. The CPU configuration includes 64 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 32 MB L3 cache. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance includes 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes, offering high-speed local storage directly attached to the Nitro hypervisor. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 15 Gbps. There are no GPUs bundled with this configuration.

Benchmark data indicates strong memory performance, with a top-tier Passmark memory score and strong large-block memory bandwidth registering at 222.8 GB/sec read and 103.49 GB/sec write. Multi-core processing is also strong, as evidenced by a Geekbench multi-core score of 17345.0 and a strong Passmark CPU physics test result. Database operations perform strongly, registering 31384.06 on Passmark database tests, while static web serving throughput reaches a strong 50.57 GB/sec. Single-core performance and LLM inference speeds generally fall within the average range, though prompt processing for large 70B models is poor at 5.18 tokens/sec.

The ARM-based architecture and dedicated core allocation provide a cost-efficient profile for workloads requiring high resource density and local storage without the overhead of hyperthreading. The combination of strong memory bandwidth, local NVMe storage, and balanced compute makes this instance highly suitable for database hosting, static web serving, multi-threaded application servers, and general-purpose enterprise workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services m7gd.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by 32 dedicated ARM64 AWS Graviton (Neoverse-V1) physical cores running at 2.6 GHz. It features 128.0 GB of memory, 1900 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 15 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth. Operating on the Nitro hypervisor, this instance delivers strong multi-core performance and top-tier memory scores, with a Passmark memory score in the top 10% and strong large-block memory bandwidth. Database operations and static web serving throughput are also strong, while single-core and LLM inference tasks perform at average levels. The combination of dedicated ARM cores and high-speed local NVMe storage makes this instance a cost-efficient choice for database hosting, static web serving, and multi-threaded enterprise applications.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m7gd.8xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated Graviton cores, 128 GB RAM, 1900 GB local NVMe SSD storage, and strong multi-core and memory benchmark performance.

tagline: An ARM-powered general-purpose instance featuring dedicated physical cores, high-speed local NVMe storage, and strong memory bandwidth performance.

128 GB of system memory with top-tier Passmark memory performance
1900 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD instance storage
Strong multi-core processing, database operations, and static web serving
Optimized for database hosting, web serving, and multi-threaded workloads
